digests.weekSummary: A quiet week dominated by routine AWS infrastructure rollouts, GitHub UI polish, and Anthropic admin/ops tweaks — almost none of it opens new capability for solo builders. The few genuine openings are Amazon Location Service's new address/drive-thru data, a strong new text-accurate image model (Seedream 5.0 Pro) now trivially callable via Vercel's AI Gateway, and the new Lovable-to-Vercel deploy integration creating a fresh, non-technical user segment worth building tooling around.
Nothing new published across any tracked source this week.
